Adventurer Challenge
Darkness Absorber Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

Weak Defense
The unit removes all shield and effects that reduce incoming damage from 3 random enemies, prevents them from getting new ones for 5 sec, and marks them for the same time. Also during this time, damage dealt to marked units is increased by 55%. When the effect wears off, each marked enemy takes pure damage equal to 35% of the damage taken while the mark was active.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
